signals.label: Provider
signals.description: Export source detected from the file shape or filename.

signals.label: Conversation date
signals.description: Best available creation or update date for each conversation.

signals.label: Message count
signals.description: Total messages found after normalizing the export.

signals.label: User prompt count
signals.description: Messages attributed to the user or human role.

signals.label: User prompt length
signals.description: Total characters in user prompts. Raw prompt text is not stored.

signals.label: Code block count
signals.description: Markdown code fences or inline code-like snippets found in normalized messages.

signals.label: Follow-up depth
signals.description: Largest count of user prompts in a single conversation after the first user prompt.

signals.label: Correction markers
signals.description: User prompts containing correction language such as actually, instead, wrong, revert, or try again.

signals.label: Dimension markers
signals.description: Keyword hits for debugging, architecture, testing, reviewing, and shipping themes.
